title: Multi Function Stainless Steel Egg Slicer for Hard Boiled Eggs Dishwasher Safe Heavy Duty Egg Cutter Kitchen Helper
features: Stainless Steel 304 Wires, ABS Bottom, Zinc Alloy
Easy to use. Put the egg on, and press gently, to make different shapes for garnish or egg-based appetizers
description: Product Description Product description Stainless Steel 304 Wires，cutting eggs precisely and fast High quality ABS Non-slip mats anti-skidding 2-in-1 design, Slice/Wedge Mode Easy to use.Put the egg on, and press gently, to make different shapes for garnish or egg-based appetizers Easy to wash.Keep it dry after using Dishwasher Safe DETAILS Zinc Alloy Zinc Alloy,heavy and durable not cheep plastic with silver coating Stainless Steel 304 Wire Thin wires of the hard-boiled egg slicer works as well as knives, cutting eggs precisely and fast. No sharp blades are equipped, thus avoiding the danger of hurting fingers. Never see any rust or bending, definitely safe to directly contact food. Non-slip mats anti-skidding Non-slip mats anti-skidding Concave Egg Tray The groove of our egg slicer perfectly fits the shape of eggs or other oval fruits. It helps you support and fix the egg in case of rolling around. With the thickened ABS base, you could finish your job in just on hand while the wire egg slicer stands sturdy on countertop. Slice/Wedge Mode 2-in-1 design This egg slicer cutter can make different shapes for garnish or egg-based appetizers. 1.Turn over the first layer and press, you could have 5mm ideal oblong or round slices. 2.Turn over the second layer and press, you could have 6 wedges. This hard boiled egg cutter would definitely be a great ally while making salad, sandwiches, deviled eggs or other meals.
